import json
from typing import Any


def _make_hashable(obj: Any) -> Any:
    if isinstance(obj, dict):
        return tuple(sorted((k, _make_hashable(v)) for k, v in obj.items()))
    if isinstance(obj, list):
        return tuple(_make_hashable(v) for v in obj)
    return obj


def deduplicate_events(events: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    seen = set()
    unique = []
    for event in events:
        key = _make_hashable(event)
        if key not in seen:
            seen.add(key)
            unique.append(event)
    return unique


def find_matching(items: list[dict], target: dict) -> list[dict]:
    target_key = _make_hashable(target)
    return [item for item in items if _make_hashable(item) == target_key]


def group_by_content(records: list[dict]) -> dict:
    groups = {}
    for rec in records:
        key = _make_hashable(rec)
        groups.setdefault(key, []).append(rec)
    return groups
